hero.quotePrimary: For God is not a God of disorder but of peace.
hero.title: Modernize your administration
hero.description: Simplify ministry to focus on what truly matters: people. A complete platform designed for the modern church.
hero.quoteSecondary: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.

features.title: Simple features for the community
features.membersDescription: See registered churches, learn their key information and follow what each community publishes.
features.calendarDescription: Follow events published by churches, see important details and stay up to date.
features.donationsDescription: Click to participate in available events and follow your community's activities.
features.communicationDescription: Exchange messages with other users and keep community communication closer.
features.communicationQuote: A simple space to connect people and communities.

join.title: Join the future of ministry today
join.description: Experience the digital sanctuary that helps your church thrive in the modern era.

footer.description: Empowering modern churches with technology designed for community and growth.

login.scriptureText: Your word is a lamp for my feet and a light on my path.
login.welcomeSubtitle: Enter your details to access the Claris portal.

register.scriptureDescription: Join a global community dedicated to quiet reflection, digital ministry, and spiritual growth.
register.title: Create an account.
register.subtitle: Enter the Digital Sanctuary. Your path begins here.
register.minimumAge: ⚠️ You must be at least 13 years old to register.

code.label: Moment of Reflection
code.quote: Peace is the silence of the soul in harmony with the eternal.
code.title: Confirm Your Identity
code.subtitle: To ensure your Claris security, we sent a verification code to:
code.footerQuote: Whatever you do, do it with all your heart.

selectOrg.title: Select Church
selectOrg.subtitle: Choose the organization you want to access.

adminRegister.scriptureQuote: Everything must be done with decency and order
adminRegister.title: Start your management journey.
adminRegister.subtitle: Create an admin account to manage your church's digital presence.

sections.acceptText: By using the Claris platform, you agree to these terms and our Privacy Policy.
useItems: You are responsible for the information provided.
Illegal, abusive or unauthorized use is not permitted.
You must keep credentials safe and confidential.
sections.contentText: All Claris content and trademarks belong to their respective owners. You retain rights to your submitted content.
sections.suspensionText: We may suspend or terminate accounts in case of violation of these terms or to protect platform security.
sections.liabilityText: Claris is not liable for indirect losses arising from the use or unavailability of the service, within applicable legal limits.
sections.contactText: For questions about these terms, please contact support.

sections.overviewText: Claris respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you use the platform.
dataItems: Account data: name, email, phone, and organization.
usageItems: Communicate updates, support, and relevant information.
Ensure security, fraud prevention, and compliance.
sections.sharingText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with essential service providers under confidentiality and security agreements.
sections.retentionText: We keep your data as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy and to meet legal obligations. We apply technical and organizational measures to protect your information.
rightsItems: Access, correct, or delete your personal data.
sections.contactText: If you have questions, please contact our support.

support.title: Support Contact
support.subtitle: We are here to help. We will respond as soon as possible.
support.helpfulText: To speed up assistance, send as many details as possible, such as organization, problem description, and screenshots.
support.statusText: Check updates and scheduled maintenance on our status page before opening a ticket.

errors.generic: An error occurred while loading data.
errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.emailNotProvided: Email not provided by the server.
errors.selectionTokenNotProvided: Selection token not provided by the server.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.organizationNotFound: Could not find data for this organization.
errors.membersLoad: Could not load members of this organization.
errors.eventsLoad: Could not load events for this organization.

create.title: Create Event
create.subtitle: Organize and share events with the community

edit.title: Edit Event
edit.bannerHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP. Landscape image recommended.

errors.titleLength: Title must be between 2 and 120 characters.
errors.invalidDate: The date or time entered is invalid.

toast.titleLengthError: Title must be between 2 and 120 characters.
toast.pastDate: Cannot create an event with a past date/time.
toast.invalidDateTime: The entered date or time is invalid.
toast.participationAdded: You are now participating in this event.
toast.participationRemoved: You are no longer participating in this event.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: Send inspiring messages to the entire congregation instantly.

members.title: Hearts in Communion
members.subtitle: People walking alongside you on this spiritual journey.
members.noFriends: You don't have any friends in this organization yet.
members.noFriendsHelp: Go to the "Members" tab and click "Friend" to add people.

create.title: Create Church
create.description: Fill in your church details here. Click save when done.
create.validation: Fill in the name and select the church.
create.imageHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP. The image appears fully on the church card.

placeholders.name: E.g.: Life Church
placeholders.description: A brief description of the church

main.title: Choose Your Church
main.subtitle: Reconnect with your spiritual home or explore new faith communities.

empty.title: You don't belong to any church yet.
empty.subtitle: Create a new one or explore available ones.

searchEmpty.title: No churches match your search.
searchEmpty.subtitle: Try a different name or clear the search.

banner.title: Share your vision
banner.subtitle: Create your church and start building a vibrant, welcoming faith community today.

explore.title: Explore new churches ({{count}})
explore.subtitle: Congregations near you or aligned with your journey.

joinConfirm.title: Join {{name}}?
joinConfirm.description: If accepted, you will join this church, see published events, be part of the community, and others will be able to interact with you.

hero.label: ADMIN PANEL
hero.title: Welcome to the Digital Sanctuary
hero.subtitle: View, manage, and connect with your faith community members.

events.title: Created Events
events.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

members.title: Church Members
members.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

deleteConfirm.title: Delete account?
deleteConfirm.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

errors.passwordLength: New password must be at least 6 characters.

search.placeholder: Search by event name, theme, or location...

leave.title: Leave {{name}}
leave.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}?
leave.adminWarningDetail: As an admin, leaving may leave the organization unmanaged. Make sure to assign another admin before leaving.
leave.accessWarning: After leaving, you will no longer have access to events, messages, and members of this organization.

center.label: Current organization
center.joinDescription: Join the {{name}} community in moments of reflection, music, and service.
center.noEvents: No events have been published in this organization yet.
center.membersSubtitle: You are joining as {{role}}. Click on a member to chat.

chat.clickToChat: Click on a friend to open a chat with them.
chat.notFriendDescription: Add them as a friend to start a conversation.
chat.conversationReady: The conversation with {{name}} is ready. Write the first message.

toast.onlyAdminCanRemove: Only admins can remove other members.
toast.memberRemoveError: Could not remove member from organization.
